calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-17-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-17-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment. No appearance by Defendant(s) at trial.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.Proceedings reported by: Irene L. Tofft, CSR#12913.

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff MIDLAND FUNDING LLC.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant RON HAYES, aka JAURON E. HAYES.
Declaration of Ruben Garlejo, Jr. pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Midland Funding LLC and against Defendant Ron Hayes, aka Jauron E. Hayes as follows:
Principal $5,250.00
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $293.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $5,543.00
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2014 Set For Trial On Feb-17-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
